programs.title: Rubble & Crew
programs.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand-new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk.

programs.title: Peppa Pig
programs.desc: There's a new friend for Peppa at her playgroup, Lotte Lama. She can speak a foreign language. Peppa loves talking. Everyone loves talking.

programs.title: Peppa Pig
programs.desc: Peppa is excited to help George explore the world of sounds now he has his new hearing aid. She shows him her favourite sounds including the splashing of jumping in a muddy puddle.

programs.title: Tim Rex in Space
programs.desc: When the Rumblefest tree for Rumblefest Eve is nowhere to be seen, Tim must find a way to save the day.

programs.title: Stan & Gran
programs.desc: Strange holes in garden fences are popping up all over Porthole and Stink has gone missing! Stan and Gran spy a mystery and decide to investigate..

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.desc: The PAW Patrol must save the day when two overly helpful robots take on more than they can handle.
